channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham pledges to cut business rates for pubs, cafes and other small businesses if he becomes PM
item.description: Andy Burnham pledges to cut business rates for pubs, cafes and other small businesses if he becomes PM

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘Violence is a red line’: could Nigel Farage’s ‘pure, cold rage’ rhetoric damage his brand?

item.title: ITVX: Starmer says Fifa 'wrong' to ban reusable water bottles at World Cup stadiums - ITVX

item.title: i Politics: The unexpected name on MPs’ lips to be Burnham’s Chancellor

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham needed to distance himself from Starmer’s ‘toxic’ Labour to boost hopes of by-election win, allies say

item.title: FT UK Politics: The Nowak murder: when tragedy meets politics
